function openPosition(uint256 assetAmount, uint256 maxDeviationBps, address exchangeAddress, bytes calldata path, uint256 deadline) external returns (uint256)
function closePosition(uint256 id, uint256 maxDeviationBps, address exchangeAddress, bytes calldata path, uint256 deadline) external

function checkPosition(uint256 id, address exchangeAddress, bytes calldata path) external view returns (bool profit, uint256 borrowerAmount, uint256 poolAmount, uint256 feeAmount, uint256 assetAmountOut)
function getPositionsOf(address owner) external view returns (uint256[] memory)

function positions(uint256 id) external view returns (uint256 id, address sender, uint256 openAssetAmount, uint256 targetAmount, uint256 openDate, uint256 expireDate, uint256 profitSharing, uint256 closeDate, uint256 closeAssetAmount)
